Channel5Plus1.uk.description: When James plans a cafe makeover for the Wholefish Cafe, he becomes over-zealous, leading to a series of events that cause a fire. (S16 Ep15)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Nature Trail: Peppa and her family follow a nature trail in the countryside, discovering footprints left by little birds and ants. (S2 Ep40)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Adventures of Paddington
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Paddington learns all about composting thanks to Mr. Mulch, but he must grow flowers in time for Aunt Lucy. (S2 Ep28)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Pip and Posy
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Pip and Posy blow bubbles to find out whose can last the longest. Pip gets upset when he keeps losing - and bursts Posy's bubble. (S2 Ep19)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: PAW Patrol
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Daring Danny tries extreme rock climbing with Ace Sorenson. It's up to the Paw Patrol to save the duo. (S7 Ep26)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Rubble & Crew
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Miles and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! (Ep34)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: While visiting Suzy and Emily's house, Peppa is surprised there are extra rules she doesn't have in her own house like no shoes indoors and no eating peanuts. (S8 Ep51)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Today is a special day because Mummy and Daddy Pig have big news to tell Peppa and George. However, Peppa and George struggle to wait patiently, so resort to playing games! (S8 Ep52)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Tim Rex in Space
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: When Tia misses the Spinny Star, Tim tries to recreate it for her. (S2 Ep30)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Stan & Gran
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A fish has gone missing from Grandad's pond and his plastic 'scare' heron appears to have come to life! Stan and Gran suspect something fishy is going on! (S1 Ep25)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: PAW Patrol
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Francois is directing a video about Mr Porter's new line of pies when his camera crane rolls away - with Francois on board! PAW Patrol must rescue Francois and track down his camera. (S11 Ep9)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Milo, Lofty and Lark are very polite and friendly delivery drivers. But trying to please everyone leads to one customer being disappointed. (S1 Ep28)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Ben and Holly make a new caterpillar friend, but she is sad that she cannot fly. (S1 Ep25)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Holiday in the Sun: On the first day in their holiday villa, Peppa and her family go exploring in the local village. (S4 Ep38)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Odo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: When Odo accidentally loses Doodle's 'treasure' (a heart shaped rock), they go on a quest to reach the end of the rainbow where Odo is sure they'll find Doodle's treasure. (S2 Ep40)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Come & Play with Pip and Posy
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Pip and Posy decide to draw a card together to celebrate being such good friends! Milkshakers pair to come up with fantastic friendship cards that only they could have made together. (Ep11)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milkshake! Story Den
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Join Jen for a story about Fergal becoming a big brother. When he meets his little sister Fern, he starts to feel jealous, angry, and worried. Dad helps Fergal deal with his feelings. (S4 Ep2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Jeremy Vine
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Storm & Alexis
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: National and international news.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Matt Allwright
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Vanessa
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Good Ship Murder
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A pickpocketing ring aboard the ship spirals into murder when one of the culprits is killed. And Jack's recklessness prompts Piers to seize the opportunity to accuse Jack of misconduct. (S2 Ep5)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Kirstie rushes to get her holiday home guest-ready and assemble a vital flat-pack table to protect her rental licence, while Simon tackles his first paid photo shoot. (S14 Ep72)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News at 5
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Love Nature
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: This film follows Tim, a rooftop beekeeper in Birmingham, whose hives sit on an old factory roof and are one of the city centre's first urban beekeeping sites. (S1 Ep21)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Occupants bail from a car believed to be on cloned plates. Will cops manage to catch them? And a transit van with a failed MOT exudes a strong smell of cannabis. (S9 Ep5)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Celebrity Puzzling
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Host Jeremy Vine and team captains Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman are joined by Olympic athlete Roger Black and comedian Geoff Norcott - can you out-solve the stars? (S2 Ep10)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Steve wants to find out if we can live by an animal that kills up to 500 people a year, visits a town where hippos roam the streets at night, feeding on lawns and bushes. (Ep2/2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Solved: The Mystery of the Mary Celeste
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Why was this perfectly sound ship abandoned mid-voyage? This film proves how, for the first time ever, modern science can unlock the truth behind this most enigmatic case.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The X-Files: Our Best Episodes Ever
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: An armed man infected with a deadly pathogen climbs into Mulder's car and instructs him to keep moving. Guest starring Bryan Cranston. (S6 Ep2)

UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Rick Stein continues his gastronomic road trip. In Albania, Rick and his son Jack visit shepherds in remote mountain expanses. S1 Ep3

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Rob Brydon, Lee Mack and David Mitchell are joined by guests Steph McGovern, Richard Osman, Jennifer Saunders and Joe Sugg. S13 Ep6

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: The best-selling writer and Pointless regular invites comedians Jayde Adams and Rufus Hound, TV presenter Josie d'Arby, and radio DJ Scott Mills to test their general knowledge skills. S4 Ep15

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Not-so-Pointless quizzing action with Mark Billingham, Neil Delamere, AJ Odudu and Lucy Porter, who are all invited to test their general knowledge skills in this edition. S4 Ep20

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: QI XL
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: M-Places: Sue Perkins, Sami Shah, David Mitchell and Alan Davies join Stephen Fry on a trip to the Mountains of Kong, Mummerset and Brown Willy. Stop sniggering at the back. S13 Ep3

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Charlie Brooker is host as artist Sir Grayson Perry and comedian Angela Barnes join team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop to delve into the news. S68 Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Forged In Fury. Sig risks capsizing when his tank floods in an Arctic storm. Sophia must prove she can lead in severe weather while Jake battles insubordination. S20, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: A broken excavator shuts down the Ferals' operation. Jacqui finds the biggest nugget of her career, while the Poseidon Crew uncover a rubbish tip. S6, Ep17

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: All-Stars: Africa Strikes Twice. One survivalist takes a huge risk to secure a big kill for his team. Plus, torrential rain and plummeting temperatures forces someone to leave. S3, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: All-Stars: To Hail And Back. Freezing rainstorms torture the remaining survivalists, risking severe hypothermia. Plus, a successful hunt ends up backfiring. S3, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Alexandria Church. The guys visit Alexandria, VA, to salvage a church and save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. And they must get creative! S10, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Brawl Of Duty - Part 1. As tempers flare, the conflict between Shawn and the Kellys becomes physical. Meanwhile, mechanical difficulties plague the Mistress. S11, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Brawl Of Duty - Part 2. As tempers flare, the conflict between Shawn and the Kellys becomes physical. Meanwhile, mechanical difficulties plague the Mistress. S11, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Mine SOS
DMAXUK.uk.description: Chris And Vince. Paul Mackie and the team try to find the causes of a two-year dry streak that threatens to end the dreams of rookie prospectors Chris Moore and Vince Federici. S1, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: The Snake Catcher
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Emergency Surgery. Today, Julia is assisted by her husband, John. Together, they catch the second most venomous snake in the world in a cramped laundry room. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Shipwrecked. The 2009 crab season is almost over, and a savage storm causes multiple maydays. Can the Coast Guard save four men before their boat is pounded against the rocks? S5, Ep16

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Slow Burn. The crab season starts with tensions high. Blood isn't thicker than salt water on the Cornelia Marie, there's deckhand poaching afoot and the fleet loses a vessel. S6, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
DMAXUK.uk.description: A Steep Price. A discovery on the island fires up the team. But as excitement builds, some dangerous encounters threaten to end the mission - and people's lives. S1, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: City Of Gold. Josh treks the Inca Trail through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of a mythical city of gold. His journey takes a detour to the ruins of Machu Picchu. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Captain Morgan's Lost Gold. Josh dives into the Lajas Reef in search of the treasure of legendary pirate Henry Morgan. His journey takes him to a modern marvel, the Panama Canal. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ozark Mountain Misery. The Raneys head off to answer an SOS call from an off-grid couple. But with severe storms threatening floods, they are in a race against Mother Nature. S1, Ep15

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Methane Meltdown. The Raneys try to restore a failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the property. S1, Ep16

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Last Chance. The end of the mining season is near. The Rookies gamble their hopes on one last haul of opal and the Opal Queen makes a final desperate dig. S2, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Young Guns face an uncertain future when James gets injured. The Bushmen find opal on the boundary of their mine, and rain slows down the Cheals. S5, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: First Timers. Captain Sean Dwyer and his crew prepare for their first crab season aboard the Brenna A. Jake fears he made a big mistake, and Wild Bill faces a challenging deckhand. S12, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: No Good Deed. Wild Bill risks his biggest lead to bail Josh out of trouble and Sean finds out if he's got what it takes. Plus, can veteran skipper Johnathan turn his season around? S12, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Maine Cabin Masters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Back For Seconds. A surprise twist sends the crew into overdrive while they're already battling freezing temperatures to deliver this dream home. S15, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Barnwood Builders
DMAXUK.uk.description: Appalachian Ancestry. The team travels to Berea, Kentucky to save a masterpiece of Appalachian craftsmanship - an incredible log cabin built in 1795. S15, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Poseidon Crew clash over a decision to switch claims. Shane and Russell receive help from a gyrocopter, and the Ferals are hit by exhaustion. S6, Ep18

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: All-Stars: Dead Weight. One camp enters the lion's den to hunt for big game. The other team bands together for a group hunt and ends up finding a dangerous, unexpected food source. S3, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: All-Stars: Burn Notice. A devastating injury and a vicious storm that destroys the survivalists' food supply threatens to tear apart the newly-merged camp. S3, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Return To Barnesville. The team take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio. A return client has an idea for a dining table set made from rusted baskets. S10, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Truce Or Consequences - Part 1. Shawn and Kris attempt to settle their feud for good. In the hopes of jump-starting his season, Zeke embarks on a marathon suction dredging campaign. S11, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Truce Or Consequences - Part 2. Shawn and Kris attempt to settle their feud for good. In the hopes of jump-starting his season, Zeke embarks on a marathon suction dredging campaign. S11, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Mine SOS
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Veterans. Paul Mackie's team have just six days to help a team of ex-servicemen become skilled mobile goldminers and reach their dream of funding a veteran's charity. S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: The Snake Catcher
DMAXUK.uk.description: Wild Dingo Territory. Julia's first customer discovers an eastern brown snake while gardening. Plus, Julia and John race to remove a python from a retirement home. S1, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Breaking 'em In. On the Kodiak and the Wizard the greenhorns are finding out how hard crabbing really is. And on Northwestern, skipper Sig is battling his brother as well as the seas. S6, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Sea Tested. It's the third week of hunting King crab and Skipper Phil and Skipper Sig's experiment in trading their junior deckhands is coming to a close. S6, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
DMAXUK.uk.description: Dire Consequences. As injuries pile up, the team push deeper into the Island in search of the Treasure of the Trinity, but a trail of clues leads to confrontation. S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Code To Gold. Josh scours the Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale treasure. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, can he solve the mysterious puzzle? S1, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Viking Sunstone. Josh Gates travels to the UK and Norway to unlock the secrets of a mystical crystal used by the Vikings. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church. S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Storm Shelter Showdown - Part 1. The Raneys arrive in Missouri to see a family that has just survived a tornado. Living in a crumbling cabin, they also have no clean water source. S1, Ep17

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Storm Shelter Showdown - Part 2. The Raneys arrive in Missouri to see a family that has just survived a tornado. Living in a crumbling cabin, they also have no clean water source. S1, Ep19

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Blacklighters spot one of the deadliest snakes in the world. The Young Guns take on a dangerous new mine, and the Opal Whisperers hunt for cathedral pattern opal. S5, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Rory and Oscar are forced to operate their dad's drill rig for the first time. The Tarantos are struck down by sickness, and the Bushmen build a dangerous mine roof. S5, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Swedish Twins. Josh is forced to take over the Cornelia Marie, whilst Sean gets his first taste of the angry sea. Meanwhile, greenhorns on the Cape Caution are slapped to attention. S12, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Million-Dollar-Bet. Jake tries a risky short cut with only one engine, and Casey and Josh perform surgery at sea. Can Edgar make his mark as captain with his novice son Eric on deck? S12, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: An American Werewolf. The team respond to reports of a half-man, half-beast in Wisconsin. Attacks and sightings of the Beast of Bray Road have left locals scared for three decades. S2, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Bigfoot
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bigfoot's Doorstep. A catastrophic storm threatens the expedition. Armed with AI technology, the team are ready to meet the elusive cryptid before it's too late. S5, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: In the final week of their season, the Gold Timers are hit by a big storm. The Ferals have a medical emergency, and Linden breaks his gold drought. S6, Ep19

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: All-Stars: Survivalists Vs. Predator. Two survivalists scavenge a nearby leopard's kill to get food. Matt Wright joins the other survivalists and causes a confrontation. S3, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: All-Stars: Feeding Frenzy. The survivalists embark on several dangerous hunts to secure protein and prepare for their arduous extraction on the horizon. S3, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.description: Drayton Mill Power Plant. The team compete against each other to see who can create the most unique piece from salvaged materials picked up at an abandoned power plant. S10, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Baltimore Fireboat. In Norfolk, VA, the crew salvages a fireboat from Baltimore. Back at the shop, a local coppersmith fashions unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke. S10, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Diver's Ed - Part 1. The Gold Ship crew strikes out on their own while Vernon is away. Shawn faces a malfunction on the Myrtle just as boss Dave Young comes to inspect it. S11, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Diver's Ed - Part 2. The Gold Ship crew strikes out on their own while Vernon is away. Shawn faces a malfunction on the Myrtle just as boss Dave Young comes to inspect it. S11, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Mine SOS
DMAXUK.uk.description: Jarrod Crosbie. Paul Mackie's mine makeover team deal with hardship and heartbreak as they help up-and-coming prospector Jarrod Crosbie overcome a barrage of setbacks. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: The Snake Catcher
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Trainee. Julia must remove a deadly snake from a frightened couple's garage. And Julia and trainee Conway deal with a constrictor snake near a youth centre. S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bering Sea Swim Club. Skippers Sig and Phil try to re-exchange their deckhands in a high seas transfer. But when both fall into the freezing water it's a race to fish them out. S6, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Arctic Quest. The Skipper of the Northwestern becomes obsessive in his hunt for the fabled blue King crab. As a storm closes in, his crew start to doubt his sanity. S6, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
DMAXUK.uk.description: Radio Silence. A dangerous run-in leads the team to an astounding new clue, but a communications breakdown leaves them in the dark about an approaching storm. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Mayan Apocalypse. Josh Gates investigates the fall of the remarkable Mayan empire, unearthing human skulls and ancient sacrificial altars underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico. S1, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Secrets Of The Nazca. Investigating giant geoglyphs drawn into the earth by ancient Nazca tribes, Josh Gates flies to Peru to study newly-found lines and joins a psychedelic ritual. S1, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Hill Of Death. The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. S1, Ep18

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: High And Dry. Amputee Jeff and wife Carol need a liveable home, water, and a place to grow food. The Raneys build an entire cabin from scratch and harness a natural spring. S2, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Tunnel Rats risk their lives to get a massive digger under the ground. Meanwhile, the Blacklighters are amazed to unearth their largest piece of opal. S5, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Bushmen's new worker faces a dangerous first day on the job. The Tarantos' overworked excavator grinds to a halt, and the Cheals are hit with more breakdowns. S5, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: 100% Injury Rate. The season's worst storm yet hits. Skipper Sean must choose between crab and an old friend. As injuries stack up one deckhand reveals a painful secret in his pants. S12, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Cold War. With Captain Edgar at the helm, the Northwestern is on the brink of mutiny. Drunk deckhands put the Saga at risk and Captain Johnathan gambles big to end his season. S12, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cornwall Air 999
DMAXUK.uk.description: The county's air ambulance is called to a pedestrian hit by a car and a critically ill cardiac case. Plus, a woman suffers a freak accident. S2, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cornwall Air 999
DMAXUK.uk.description: The paramedics treat a cyclist who may be paralysed and a farmer who's fallen off a barn roof. Plus, there's a tricky landing to help a holidaymaker. S2, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: After two workers quit, the Dust Devils are forced to hire an 18-year-old rookie. Plus, the Poseidon Crew hope to end their season with a big nugget. S6, Ep20

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Legacy: Phil visits his dad to make sure he's OK after hearing some concerning news. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch a bunch of their old childhood memorabilia. (S11 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Bank Job: Peralta and Diaz learn that there's more to Lt Melanie Hawkins' team than meets the eye as they hunt for the gang of bank robbers. (S4 Ep21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Crime & Punishment: Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didn't commit. Can their Nine-Nine buddies save them from jail!? (S4 Ep22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: I'm Goin' to Praiseland: Ned opens a Christian amusement park. At first, the tame religious attractions are unpopular. But then visitors start having visions... (S12 Ep19/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Simpsons Tall Tales: A hobo regales the family with unique takes on classic American tales starring the Simpsons as Connie Appleseed, Paul Bunyan and Tom Sawyer. (S12 Ep21/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bart's in Jail!: When a phone scammer who's pretending to be Bart fools Grampa into giving away $10,000, it's Homer who's the real victim. According to Homer, anyway. (S33 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: MAFS UK Does Come Dine with Me
E4Plus1.uk.description: Kristina Goodsell hosts an orange-themed party, with a set from her fave DJ. No red flags here, just one guest dressed as a traffic cone! But who's won the week? (Ep5/5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Anneka Rice, John Bishop, Nadine Coyle and Ade Adepitan tackle choux buns and make a cake that represents something from their bucket list. (S4 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
E4Plus1.uk.description: (2019) Sci-fi action sequel with Linda Hamilton and Arnold Schwarzenegger. A factory worker is targeted by deadly robot assassins from the future. Thank goodness he's back.

Film4.uk.title: Alita: Battle Angel
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

Film4.uk.title: Mean Streets
Film4.uk.description: (1973) Scorsese's classic crime drama about the ordinary lives of mafiosi - the boredom, casual violence and shattered dreams - in Little Italy, with Harvey Keitel and Robert De Niro.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Leave Her to Heaven
Film4.uk.description: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

Film4.uk.title: Halls of Montezuma
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Second World War drama. Richard Widmark stars as a commanding officer leading US Marines into the Pacific to capture Japanese prisoners and discover the location of a rocket base.

Film4.uk.title: Sailor of the King
Film4.uk.description: (1953) Drama starring Jeffrey Hunter as a Canadian serving in the WWII Royal Navy who is captured by the German raider that sunk his ship but escapes and seeks revenge.

Film4.uk.title: Tomahawk
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Western starring Van Heflin. During the uprising of the Sioux nation, a cunning scout attempts to save the 7th Cavalry after an officer orders the brutal massacre of Sioux innocents.

Film4.uk.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
Film4.uk.description: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

Film4.uk.title: The Creator
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

Film4.uk.title: A Hidden Life
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Epic World War II drama telling the agonising story of one man's fight for the right to not kill. A conscientious objector from rural Austria refuses to fight for Germany.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Send Me No Flowers
Film4.uk.description: (1964) Romcom starring Rock Hudson and Doris Day. Thinking he has just a few months to live, a man makes his wife suspect he's having an affair when he tries to find her a new partner.

Film4.uk.title: Gunman's Walk
Film4.uk.description: (1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.

Film4.uk.title: Patton
Film4.uk.description: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies
Film4.uk.description: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

Film4.uk.title: Reality
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Tina Satter's tense fact-based whistleblower drama stars Sydney Sweeney (White Lotus) as Reality Winner - a young woman being questioned by the FBI about leaked top-secret documents.

Film4.uk.title: Salt
Film4.uk.description: (2010) Action-thriller starring Angelina Jolie. A CIA agent goes on the run after a Russian defector claims that she's a sleeper agent who's about to commit a terrible act of terrorism.

Film4.uk.title: Zola
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Dark comedy drama based on a viral Twitter thread. Dancer Zola (Taylour Paige) joins a road trip to Tampa, where she gets dragged too far into the sex work world. Adults only.

Film4.uk.title: Shiva Baby
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Comedy-drama. A college student struggles to keep a lid on her secrets as she awkwardly encounters her sugar daddy and the ex-girlfriend she's still hung up on at a shiva.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Ride Lonesome
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

Film4.uk.title: Yellow Sky
Film4.uk.description: (1949) Western. Gregory Peck plays the leader of an outlaw gang whose plans to rob an old man and his granddaughter of their gold go seriously awry. With Anne Baxter and Richard Widmark.

Film4.uk.title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Drama. Director Sam Wood's epic adaptation of Ernest Hemingway's classic story about the Spanish Civil War. Starring Oscar-nominees Gary Cooper and Ingrid Bergman.

Film4.uk.title: Monkey Business
Film4.uk.description: (1952) Screwball comedy starring Cary Grant as a scientist who drinks the elixir of youth and starts acting the fool, as does his strait-laced wife (Ginger Rogers).

Film4.uk.title: Taxi
Film4.uk.description: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

Film4.uk.title: The Equalizer
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

Film4.uk.title: Deja Vu
Film4.uk.description: (2006) Pulsating sci-fi action with Denzel Washington and Val Kilmer. An AFT agent uses new technology to reach back in time, stop a ferry bombing, and save the love of his life. Simple.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Orphan: First Kill
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Alita: Battle Angel

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight
GBNews.uk.description: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Late...
GBNews.uk.description: Edition. Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Patrick Christys.

GBNews.uk.description: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Dawn Neesom bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

GBNews.uk.title: Martin Daubney
GBNews.uk.description: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

GBNews.uk.title: Dewbs & Co
GBNews.uk.description: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

GBNews.uk.title: Lee Anderson's Real World
GBNews.uk.description: Lee Anderson brings the Real World to the Great British public, as the silent majority finally have their voices heard.

GBNews.uk.title: Friday Night with Matt Goodwin
GBNews.uk.description: Britain was once the envy of the world. Join Matt Goodwin as he explores how we fix the problems facing the country.

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight
GBNews.uk.description: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Late...
GBNews.uk.description: Edition. Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Patrick Christys.
